title: lastreopsis confinis
intro: Lastreopsis confinis, also known as the Australian fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Lastreopsis confinis is often used as a tea or infusion, or it can be dried and made into a powder for capsule or tablet form.
